selections.name: Mangano
selections.reason: Street Boss filly from the elite Moody/Coleman yard. Won her latest jump-out by a space, signaling strong intent for a big debut showing. Top pick.

selections.name: Fram Strait
selections.reason: Godolphin gelding by Lonhro who has trialled very well, including a recent Cranbourne jump-out win. The Freedman stable strikes at a high rate with debutants.

selections.name: Bonus Season
selections.reason: Resuming after a solid first campaign where she placed at Sale. Form from last prep has been franked and she draws perfectly in barrier 2.

selections.name: Bold Amore
selections.reason: Has race experience on his side and wasn't far away when 2nd at Holbrook last start. Can measure up despite the wide draw.

danger_horse.name: Bonus Season
danger_horse.reason: Has the race experience and form on the board from last prep to upset the debutants.

selections.name: Yule Point
selections.reason: Second-up after a strong return when 2nd at Wangaratta. Has a fitness edge on key rivals and draws well to sit just off the pace.

selections.name: Conflict
selections.reason: Moody/Coleman runner resuming. Placed at Ballarat before a spell and has trialled well leading into this. Major player if he gains a start.

selections.name: Real Heir
selections.reason: Returned from a break with a solid 3rd at Colac. Strips fitter for that run and maps to get a nice run from barrier 5.

selections.name: Tagamate
selections.reason: Resuming after showing glimpses of ability last prep. Took ground off a rival in a recent jump-out and gets the inside alley advantage.

danger_horse.name: Conflict
danger_horse.reason: Showed good ability in his first prep and looks to have come back stronger based on jump-outs.

selections.name: Carriedo
selections.reason: Third-up and ready to peak. Narrowly beaten at Cranbourne last start and this looks a very suitable progression for the Begg-trained filly.

selections.name: Boomeroo
selections.reason: Resuming after a 12-week break. Showed promise last prep and her latest jump-out was highly encouraging. Big threat.

selections.name: The Defender
selections.reason: Racing consistently with a 4th at Seymour and 2nd at Wangaratta recently. Draws the inside and rarely runs a bad race.

selections.name: King Camelot
selections.reason: Well-supported on debut when 4th at Horsham. Talented gelding who is sure to measure up with natural improvement.

danger_horse.name: Boomeroo
danger_horse.reason: Has the raw ability to win this fresh if she brings her best form from last campaign.

selections.name: Sunburnt Country
selections.reason: Third-up today. Strong 2nd at Seymour fresh and wasn't far away at Caulfield Heath last time. Looks hard to beat in this line-up.

selections.name: Princess Of Sol
selections.reason: Made good ground for 2nd at Werribee two back before a fair effort at Kyneton. Major player on her best form despite the wide draw.

selections.name: Nothin' Wong Here
selections.reason: Third-up. Solid 3rd at Caulfield Heath fresh and form out of his last race has held up well. Strong contender.

selections.name: Epoch
selections.reason: Placed third-up previously. Ran well for 3rd at Ballarat last start and is suited to this class of race.

danger_horse.name: Princess Of Sol
danger_horse.reason: Has the turn of foot to overcome the wide barrier if the pace is genuine.

selections.name: King Alla
selections.reason: Racing well recently. Won at Kilmore two back and boxed on steadily at Colac last start. Key top-three player.

selections.name: Ricky Runs
selections.reason: Consistent type who was 3rd at Werribee before a fair 5th at Moe. Only needs to hold form to feature in this grade.

selections.name: Vaafee
selections.reason: Has been racing well without luck from wide gates. Gets a low draw today which could be the difference.

selections.name: Fashion Fighter
selections.reason: Gave a sight on-speed for 3rd at Colac last start. Can be competitive if he dictates terms.

danger_horse.name: Ricky Runs
danger_horse.reason: Very consistent at this level and overdue for a win.

selections.name: Stewart
selections.reason: Recent form is sound. Rounded them up to win impressively at Stony Creek last start and looks well suited here.

selections.name: Emerald Court
selections.reason: Crossed from a wide gate to lead and win at Colac last start. Up in weight and drawn wide but hard to overlook.

selections.name: Redemption Time
selections.reason: Finished a close 2nd to Emerald Court last start. Draws better than her rival this time and gets a weight swing.

selections.name: The Cruiser
selections.reason: Made significant ground from the rear for 2nd at Stony Creek last start. Form ties in nicely with Stewart.

danger_horse.name: Emerald Court
danger_horse.reason: Has the early speed to cross and dictate, making her very dangerous if left alone in front.

selections.name: Flowerdale
selections.reason: Third-up today. Won fresh at Sale then a solid 2nd at Sandown-Hillside. Well placed here and is the one to beat.

selections.name: Arcandam
selections.reason: Raced near the speed to win at Warrnambool two back before a fair 5th at Caulfield. Right in this on his best form.

selections.name: Didn't Miss Many
selections.reason: First-up. Won at Warrnambool to close out last prep. Prefer to see how he returns but has the class.

selections.name: Acta Non Verba
selections.reason: Resuming after a break. Has run well fresh before and gets a soft run from the inside gate.

danger_horse.name: Arcandam
danger_horse.reason: Has the tactical speed to overcome the draw and put himself in a winning position.

selections.name: Network Error
selections.reason: Racing well recently with a 2nd at Kilmore and 3rd at Wangaratta. Has been consistent and finds a very winnable race.

selections.name: Aussieaussieaussie
selections.reason: Won at Moe two starts back at big odds. Needs to replicate that form but has shown he can win in this grade.

selections.name: Jenni Of Avalon
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten at Werribee two starts back. Hard to beat if she brings her best form despite the wide draw.

selections.name: Airclash
selections.reason: Peak fitness now after a solid 4th at Yarra Valley last start. Past two runs suggest he is ready to strike.

danger_horse.name: Aussieaussieaussie
danger_horse.reason: Capable of springing an upset if he repeats his Moe winning performance.
